creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #1)

Is it not OK to use hard-coded path in a patch.
It should be better to fix it in a cmake way, e.g. using cmake variables instead.
But I need more time on this.

(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #2)

I'll fix the ODBC part by installing the missing cpl_odbc.h first.
